deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
learningOutcomes:
Be able to understand, explain and read in the Engineering Drawing, Diagram and
standard drawing, drawing type, Symbols, Dimension, Tolerance, Projection, Fit and Clearance,
Welding, Brazing, Soldering and Bonding and Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience
with work, a habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to understand and read the Engineering Drawing, Diagram and standard
drawing, drawing type, Symbols, Dimension, Tolerance, Projection, Fit and Clearance, Welding,
Brazing, Soldering and Bonding.
2. Be able to explain and read the Engineering Drawing, Diagram and standard drawing,
drawing type, Symbols, Dimension, Tolerance, Projection, Fit and Clearance, Welding, Brazing,
Soldering and Bonding
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge in the Engineering Drawing, Diagram and standard
drawing, drawing type, Symbols, Dimension, Tolerance, Projection, Fit and Clearance, Welding,
Brazing, Soldering and Bonding.
competencies:
1. Describe, read and and codify knowledge about the Engineering Drawing, Diagram
and standard drawing, drawing type, Symbols, Dimension, Tolerance, Projection, Fit and
Clearance, Welding, Brazing, Soldering and Bonding.
2. Apply knowledge in the Engineering Drawing, Diagram and standard drawing, drawing
type, Symbols, Dimension, Tolerance, Projection, Fit and Clearance, Welding, Brazing, Soldering
and Bonding.
description:
To study and practice about the Engineering Drawing, Diagram and Standard drawing,
Drawing type, Symbols, Dimension, Tolerance, Projection and Identifying title block
information including Air Transport Association (ATA) Specification 100, wiring diagram and
schematic diagram, Fit and Clearance, Welding, Brazing, Soldering and Bonding method,
Inspection of soldering joint and Inspection of welded and brazed joint.
